response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video, identified two distinct vocal performances. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Zutto Issho!' (based on on-screen text) performed by Nekomata Okayu and Hoshimachi Suisei. 3. Identified Song 2 as 'Ai♡Scream!' (based on on-screen text) performed by Nekomata Okayu, Usada Pekora, and Himemori Luna. 4. Searched for official lyrics for both songs. As exact, complete lyrics were not found in the search results, placeholders are used.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two song performances from the 'Nekomata Okayu Birthday Live 2026'. The first song is 'Zutto Issho!' performed by Nekomata Okayu and Hoshimachi Suisei. The second song is 'Ai♡Scream!' performed by Nekomata Okayu, Usada Pekora, and Himemori Luna.
